# Security Policy

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security vulnerability within this repository or the live site (https://xivtodo.com), please **do not** open a public issue. Instead, report it privately:

- **GitHub Private Vulnerability Reporting:** You can submit a report via the "Security" tab on the GitHub repository.
- **Direct Contact:** Alternatively, please email me directly. My email address can be found on my website contact page at [olivi-eh.dev/contact/](https://olivi-eh.dev/contact/).

We will endeavor to acknowledge your report and coordinate a fix as quickly as possible. Thank you for helping keep XIV ToDo secure!
